title: Bounded Host-Side Relay Search Criteria Reset Source/Test Trial Execution

No commit, no push, no parent-root publication, no package or lockfile mutation, no dependency install, no package-manager activation/download, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no migration approval, and no old-clone mutation

Reset the relay query to `SEL`, reset current multiples to `2, 5, 10`, clear relay error state, clear stale section search results, and clear loaded primary and compare relay selections.

Add a focused browser-smoke assertion proving the reset restores search defaults, hides stale validation/error text, removes stale relay selection panels, and does not issue extra governed backend calls merely by resetting.

Do not commit or publish the host source artifact.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, remote rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, commit, push, publication, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only the bounded two-file host-side source/test trial artifact.
